name: Heraldic Beast Aberconway
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>紋</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>章</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アバコーンウェイ
desc: If this card is in your GY: You can banish 1 other "Heraldic Beast Aberconway" from your GY, then target 1 "Heraldic Beast" monster in your GY; add that target to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Heraldic Beast Aberconway" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If this card is in your GY: You can banish 1 other "Heraldic Beast Aberconway" from your GY, then target 1 "Heraldic Beast" monster in your GY; add that target to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Heraldic Beast Aberconway" once per turn.
eff: If this card is in your GY: You can banish 1 other "Heraldic Beast Aberconway" from your GY, then target 1 "Heraldic Beast" monster in your GY; add that target to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Heraldic Beast Aberconway" once per turn.
